zh.lifeSummary: 當Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg於1210年3月16日出生在德國布藍登波格時，她的父親Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg11207歲，母親Mathilde von Groitzsch25歲。她於1228年與Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg在德國布勞恩史維結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1261年6月17日在德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維享年51歲，埋葬在德國布勞恩史維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg于1210年3月16日出生在德国布藍登波格时，她的父亲Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg11207岁，母亲Mathilde von Groitzsch25岁。她于1228年与Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg在德国布勞恩史維结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1261年6月17日在德国尼德薩辛布勞恩史維享年51岁，埋葬在德国布勞恩史維。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Brandenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Brandenburg, the name of a province, its principal city, and numerous other places.

variants.name: Brandenberg
meanings: German and Swiss German: habitational name from any of several minor places called Brandenberg, for example in Bavaria and Rhineland.
German: in some cases, probably also a variant of   Brandenburg  .

variants.name: Brandenburger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Brandenburg (see   Brandenburg  ).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg was born on 16 March 1210, in Brandenburg, Germany, her father, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, was 11207 and her mother, Mathilde von Groitzsch, was 25. She married Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg in 1228, in Brunswick, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 17 June 1261, in Brunswick, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 51, and was buried in Brunswick, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg est née le 16 mars 1210, à Brandenburg, Allemagne, son père, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, avait 11207 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Groitzsch, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg en 1228, à Braunschweig, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 juin 1261, à Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Braunschweig, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg am 16. März 1210 in Brandenburg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg 11207 und ihre Mutter Mathilde von Groitzsch 25. Sie hat 1228 in Braunschweig, Deutschland Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Juni 1261 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Braunschweig, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg è nata il il 16 marzo 1210 nel Brandenburg, Germania, sua padre, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, aveva 11207 anni e sua madre, Mathilde von Groitzsch, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg nel 1228, nel Braunschweig, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 17 giugno 1261, nel Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Braunschweig, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburgが1210年3月16日にドイツブランデンブルグで生まれた時，父Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburgは11207歳，母Mathilde von Groitzschは25歳であった。1228年にドイツブラウンスチウエイグでOtto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1261年6月17日にドイツニーダーサチセンブラウンスチウエイグで51歳で死去し，ドイツブラウンスチウエイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg(이)가 1210년 3월 16일 독일 브랜덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg(은)는 11207세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde von Groitzsch(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1228년 독일 브라슈위그에서 Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1261년 6월 17일 독일 니더작센 브라슈위그에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 브라슈위그에 묻혔다.

pt.16 March 1210–17 June 1261: 16 de março de 1210–17 de junho de 1261
pt.Brandenburg, Brandenburg, Germany: Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Alemanha
pt.Brandenburg, Brandenburg, Deutschland: Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Alemanha
pt.Brandenburg, Heiligenbeil, East Prussia,: Brandenburg, Kreis Heiligenbeil, Ostpreußen, Preußen, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg nasceu em 16 de março de 1210, em Brandenburg, Alemanha, seu pai, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, tinha 11207 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Groitzsch, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg em 1228, em Braunschweig, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de junho de 1261, em Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Braunschweig, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg родилась 16 марта 1210 г. в местности брэнденбург, Германия, её отцу по имени Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg было 11207 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Groitzsch, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg в 1228 г. в местности браунщвиг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 17 июня 1261 г. в местности браунщвиг, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности браунщвиг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg nació el 16 de marzo de 1210, en Brandenburg, Alemania, su papá, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, tenía 11207 años y su mamá, Mathilde von Groitzsch, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg en 1228, en Braunschweig, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 17 de junio de 1261, en Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Braunschweig, Alemania.
